domain: Mudskipper bimodal respiration — gill in water, cutaneous/buccal in air; valve-switched modes with 76% skin O2 uptake on land.
specific_mechanism: Environmental sensor (presence/absence of water) triggers mode switch; valve maintains transitional state; both physiological systems remain available, only one is active.
llm_application: MUDSKIP-MODE: dual-mode inference. Mode A: GPU-throughput-optimized batch prefill+attention. Mode B: low-latency streaming decode with KV-light path. Engine detects request mode and switches; valve = context-preserving transition gate ensuring no state loss across switch.
novelty_claim: Continuous batching, KVPR, latency-aware customization all do prefill/decode phase optimization. MUDSKIP-MODE adds bimodal environmental-detector switch — close to dual-phase serving with adaptive switching.
